Dialog.name: MSG_EXIT_FUKA_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}Do you want to open and go through the door?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EXIT_FUKA_NAVI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}I'll find a safe route for you to traverse, so just follow my directions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5099 0 0}That dark figure from before... It went in here, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5058 0 0}Ah, sorry. I didn't mean to get carried away.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}This appears to be the first door. I wonder what we'll find inside...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}Well, if we don't go through it, then we can't do anything about the current situation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}I suppose we have no choice but to enter.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 -1 0 0}Are you ready? I'll do my best to support you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}This door... I wonder where it leads.[n]{f 1 1}
